column1: # Slice OPS.4 — OWASP ZAP baseline rule overrides (suppression baseline).
# Use IGNORE only for a triaged false-positive / accepted finding, with a
# comment recording who/when/why. The go-live gate is: run the baseline against
# the near-final surface, triage every WARN/FAIL, and either fix it or add a
# justified IGNORE line here — no un-triaged HIGH remains.
# (empty — populate during the pre-launch ZAP triage)
